title: KidGoals
description: A minor member's chore-based allowances and kid-friendly savings goals (FR-HH-002). Provided by Module 14 to Goals (Spine) — which mirrors a KidGoal as a GoalState entry for time-to-goal context — and to Habits (chore completion can advance a habit streak). All monetary amounts are integer minor units (CAD cents) via MoneyCents (Constitution IV) — NEVER float. FinOS NEVER moves money: an allowance accrual is a tracked, recommend-only ledger figure the guardian executes in the real world (FR-X-003); the 'paid' state is a record of a real-world action, not a FinOS transfer. Allowance accrual and chore-completion writes are idempotent, keyed on source_event_id (FR-X-003). Visibility is gated by MemberScope/guardian relationship (FR-HH-001): a kid sees only their own KidGoals (ux-foundations §10.6).

kid_profile_id.description: The minor member who owns these goals/allowances. AuthZ server-side: only the kid and their guardian(s) (per MemberScope) may read.

goals.description: May be empty (kid has no goals yet — consumers show the Empty state, never a zero-filled '$0.00').

name.description: Kid-chosen goal name (e.g. a toy). Displayed verbatim; not translated.

saved_amount.description: Amount accrued toward the goal from completed allowances, integer cents. A MONEY value: if its freshness is stale, time-to-goal context is flagged, not silently shown as current.

time_to_goal_days.description: Computed days to completion at the current allowance accrual pace; null when pace is unknown/zero — never guessed (Constitution VI).

allowances.description: Chore-based allowance definitions for this kid. Optional; a kid may have goals without allowances or vice versa.

chore_name_en.description: Chore label in English (en-CA). Both EN and FR required where the chore is a FinOS-suggested template; user-entered chores are displayed verbatim in the language entered.

chore_name_fr.description: Chore label in French (fr-CA). A missing fr label on a FinOS-supplied template chore is a bilingual defect (Constitution II).

chore_name.description: User-entered chore name when the chore is not a FinOS template (displayed verbatim, single language).

reward_amount.description: CAD cents earned per completion. Integer cents — never float.

cadence.description: How the chore recurs / how the reward accrues.

linked_kid_goal_id.description: Optional goal this allowance accrues toward; advances saved_amount on completion.

linked_habit_id.description: Optional Habits streak this chore completion advances (FR-HH-002 → Habits). Real completion only — never a manual streak bump.

accrued_amount.description: Total earned-but-not-yet-handed-over, integer cents. A tracked ledger figure; FinOS never disburses it.

paid_amount.description: Total a guardian has recorded as handed over in the real world, integer cents. 'Paid' is a RECORD of a real-world action (recommend-only, FR-X-003), not a FinOS money movement.

freshness.description: Freshness of the kid-goals snapshot. saved_amount/accrued_amount are MONEY values: a stale snapshot flags time-to-goal context rather than presenting it as current (Constitution VIII).
